name: arrs
description: The *arr / media-automation stack in one plugin: Radarr, Sonarr, Prowlarr, Overseerr, SABnzbd, qBittorrent, Plex, Jellyfin, Tautulli, and Tracearr — each operated via its own REST API. Credentials are configured here and bridged to the skills via a generated env file.

settings.name: Jellyfin API key
settings.description: Jellyfin API key (Dashboard → API Keys), sent as X-Emby-Token.

settings.name: Jellyfin URL
settings.description: Jellyfin base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8096 (no trailing slash).

settings.name: Overseerr API key
settings.description: Overseerr API key (Settings → General).

settings.name: Overseerr URL
settings.description: Overseerr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:5055 (no trailing slash).

settings.name: Plex token
settings.description: Plex X-Plex-Token.

settings.name: Plex URL
settings.description: Plex Media Server base URL incl. port, e.g. http://localhost:32400.

settings.name: Prowlarr API key
settings.description: Prowlarr API key (Settings → General).

settings.name: Prowlarr URL
settings.description: Prowlarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:9696 (no trailing slash).

settings.name: qBittorrent password
settings.description: qBittorrent WebUI password.

settings.name: qBittorrent URL
settings.description: qBittorrent WebUI base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080 (no trailing slash).

settings.name: qBittorrent username
settings.description: qBittorrent WebUI username.

settings.name: Radarr API key
settings.description: Radarr API key (Settings → General).

settings.name: Radarr default quality profile
settings.description: Quality profile id used when adding movies. Default: '1'.

settings.name: Radarr URL
settings.description: Radarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:7878 (no trailing slash).

settings.name: SABnzbd API key
settings.description: SABnzbd API key (Config → General).

settings.name: SABnzbd URL
settings.description: SABnzbd base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080 (no trailing slash).

settings.name: Sonarr API key
settings.description: Sonarr API key (Settings → General).

settings.name: Sonarr default quality profile
settings.description: Quality profile id used when adding series. Default: '1'.

settings.name: Sonarr URL
settings.description: Sonarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8989 (no trailing slash).

settings.name: Tautulli API key
settings.description: Tautulli API key (Settings → Web Interface).

settings.name: Tautulli URL
settings.description: Tautulli base URL incl. port, e.g. http://localhost:8181.

settings.name: Tracearr URL
settings.description: Tracearr base URL for its public API, e.g. http://localhost:3000 (no trailing slash).
